overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a derelict urban area with overgrown vegetation, abandoned concrete structures, and futuristic city views. The player ascends stairs, passes NPCs near a graffiti-covered building, and transitions from bright sunlight into a dark covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown concrete stairway leading to abandoned urban area

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs surrounded by palm trees and concrete retaining walls

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with debris and dry grass growing in cracks
tall palm tree visible at top of stairs against bright blue sky
smooth concrete retaining walls flanking the staircase
dry grass and small plants growing between concrete slabs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view ascending a wide concrete staircase in bright midday sun. Palm trees and overgrown vegetation line the path, with concrete walls on both sides. The atmosphere is warm and deserted, with an abandoned building visible in the distance at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned brutalist building entrance with graffiti

events.description: approaching abandoned building entrance where NPCs are gathered
passing close to group of NPCs near building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and observing NPCs standing near the doorway

notable_agents.action: group of three people near entrance, one person bending down to pick something up from the ground

entered.detail: multi-story brutalist concrete building with vegetation growing on balconies and faded yellow paint
wall covered in large red and white graffiti tags
dark entranceway to the abandoned structure with debris piled nearby

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens to an abandoned concrete building with brutalist architecture. The camera approaches the entrance where three NPCs are gathered, one bending down near the doorway. A wall covered in red graffiti is prominent on the left, and the area is partially shaded by the building's overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with panoramic city views

events.description: moving past building to open overlook with views of futuristic city skyline
entering covered walkway, sunlight fading as moving under concrete overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook railing with expansive views of the futuristic cityscape and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: person with red hair sitting on concrete ledge looking out at the city view
person standing near railing overlooking the industrial district below

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures with smoke stacks and construction cranes in the distance
wide concrete platform with metal safety railing overlooking the city
dark tunnel-like entrance to covered pedestrian walkway under the structure

segments.scene_description: Moving past the abandoned building, the scene opens to a wide overlook with panoramic views of a futuristic city skyline featuring towering skyscrapers and industrial smokestacks. NPCs are scattered around the overlook, with one sitting on a ledge and another standing by the railing. The camera approaches a dark covered walkway entrance as the lighting begins to transition from bright sun to shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: now fully inside dark covered corridor with only dim light from distant openings

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered corridor with concrete pillars and occasional NPCs visible in the shadows

notable_agents.action: person standing against the wall in the shadows near a doorway

entered.detail: long covered walkway with rough concrete floor and exposed ceiling beams
low concrete overhang creating dark shadowed environment with light filtering through gaps
thick concrete support pillars lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Now fully inside the covered walkway, the environment becomes significantly darker with only dim natural light filtering through distant openings. The corridor features rough concrete surfaces, support pillars on the right, and a metal railing on the left overlooking the city below. Sparse NPCs are visible in the shadows along the walls as the camera continues forward through the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched outdoor ascent into the dim shadows of a brutalist urban underpass. It begins by climbing a wide concrete staircase lined with palm trees and overgrown vegetation under a bright midday sun. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens onto a concrete plaza featuring a graffiti-covered building where several NPCs gather in the partial shade of a heavy overhang. The view then expands across a wide overlook revealing a panoramic futuristic skyline of skyscrapers and smokestacks before the camera turns toward a dark entrance. Finally, the environment shifts abruptly into a covered walkway, where the bright sunlight vanishes and is replaced by dim natural light filtering through a corridor of rough concrete pillars and metal railings.
